title: anemonastrum obtusilobum
intro: Anemonastrum obtusilobum, also known as the meadow anemone or Chinese crowfoot, is a perennial plant species in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid and saponin content. The health benefits of Anemonastrum obtusilobum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory and skin conditions, as well as its potential anti-cancer and immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, Anemonastrum obtusilobum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, but it should be used with caution due to its potential toxicity and allergenic properties.
